themes: Multi-location manager frustration: The overwhelming majority of contacts are Managers across franchise, hospitality, fitness, residential, and home-services brands, suggesting a concentrated need around simplifying day-to-day location reporting and workflows at scale.

Urgency driven by long wait times: Many contacts have been waiting well over 100 days — some approaching a year — signaling a risk of churn or disengagement that requires prioritized, personalized outreach rather than generic follow-up.

Repeat accounts with multiple contacts: Several brands (Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential, Ford, Anytime Fitness, 29th Street Living, Vetcor, LivCor, Balfour Beatty) appear multiple times, indicating either unresolved pain points or broad internal interest that could benefit from a coordinated, account-level conversation.
